lists.0: LED is light when UPA is OFF
lists.1: LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

lists.0: the button has not been pushed yet
lists.1: the button was pushed at least one time

lists.4: FKP Front Side Left Only (all zones)
lists.5: FKP Front Side Right Only (all zones)
lists.6: FKP Rear Side Left Only (all zones
lists.7: FKP Rear Side Right Only (all zones)

lists.0: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
